final_prompt.prompt:
Create a vertical short-form video cover for an esports monitor product launch.

Style/medium: needs a minimalist premium aesthetic — exact restraint level is yours
Composition: must be rule-of-thirds framing
Subject: must include the esports monitor as focal subject
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: needs a premium tech direction — exact hex values are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "8k GGU 电竞显示器 1000hz" (large, primary headline), "全球首发全新面板 低延迟 完美色彩" (secondary supporting copy)
Constraints: must preserve large bold headline for eye-catching impact, vertical format optimized for short video platforms
Avoid:
